finding: A provider-bound pages.dev URL is insufficient deployment evidence because it can identify a different Cloudflare Pages project. The composite validator must bind the served URL to the declared research project while accepting legitimate branch-preview subdomains.

cases: branch-preview hostname for expected project accepted

limits: No Cloudflare deployment occurred in this run.
No resolving public URL or served commit was obtained.
CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN remain required for deployment.
Project-bound hostname validation does not prove account control or claim truth.
falsification_route: The improvement fails if CI accepts an unrelated-project.pages.dev URL for C-001, rejects a valid branch-preview subdomain of mirror-cartographer-research.pages.dev, or the live workflow emits a Pages URL that cannot satisfy the declared project policy.
